newsSinceJun6: No new fundamental news (no contracts, earnings, or capacity announcements). The June 5 20% limit-up to a record high (RMB 7.9B turnover) was triggered by a viral post from finance blogger 'Serenity' naming the stock his favorite China humanoid play; June 8 added ~9-10% on reducer-sector rotation while Sina Finance reported 'national team' state funds have reduced holdings for three consecutive quarters. June 9's -1.9% to 420.17 is mild digestion of a flow-driven melt-up, not a thesis event.

sources.label: ThePaper: blogger post ignited 20cm limit-up to record high (Jun 5)
10jqka: RMB 7.9B turnover, RMB 1.1B main-force inflow on limit-up day
Sina Finance (Jun 8): limit-up while national team trims for third straight quarter

verdicts.rankRationale: New color since Jun 6 confirms the spike was flow-driven: a retail-influencer post sparked the Jun 5 limit-up and state funds are distributing into strength, while no new fundamental evidence (orders, wins, capacity) emerged. On a crowding-sensitive alpha list, a +120% YTD rerating on sentiment alone keeps eroding residual alpha; today's -1.9% is digestion, not an asymmetry-restoring washout.
verdicts.bull: Genuine bottleneck asset: 60%+ domestic harmonic reducer share, Tesla/UBTech-linked supply chain, Q1 2026 net profit +61%, and management confirming order books are full with capacity expansion funded.
verdicts.neutral: Quality of the franchise is not in dispute; the debate is price. At ~RMB 72B cap and 2.2x YTD rerating, humanoid volume ramp is largely pre-paid and the name is no longer hidden by any definition.
verdicts.bear: A rally catalyzed by a viral blogger post with national-team funds selling for three quarters is classic late-cycle retail crowding; any humanoid mass-production delay or sector rotation back to compute could unwind 30-40% fast.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Confirmed large-volume actuator/reducer purchase orders from Tesla Optimus or domestic humanoid OEM mass-production ramps converting hype into revenue.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Flow reversal in the crowded humanoid trade — influencer-driven retail positioning unwinding against state-fund distribution, with valuation offering no support.
